hero.headline: Scheduling for
hero.subtitle: Beep gives every professional in Tunisia a personal booking page. Clients find you, pick a time, pay securely, and join a video call — all in one place.

howItWorks.label: How it works
howItWorks.title: Three steps to expertise
howItWorks.step1Desc: Browse by category, specialty, or price. Read reviews from real clients. Every expert is verified.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Choose an available slot on their calendar. Pay securely — funds are held until the session completes.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Connect face-to-face in your browser. No downloads, no subscriptions. Just click and talk.

testimonials.label: Testimonials
testimonials.title: Trusted by thousands
testimonials.t1Text: I found an incredible English tutor on Beep in minutes. The video quality was perfect and booking was seamless. My IELTS score went from 6.0 to 7.5 in just 2 months!
testimonials.t2Text: As a doctor, I can now offer consultations beyond my clinic hours. Beep handles scheduling, payments, and video — I just focus on my patients. My income grew 40%.
testimonials.t3Text: The refund policy gives me confidence to try new experts. I booked a fitness coach, and when my schedule changed, the cancellation was instant and fair.

cta.title: Ready to get started?
cta.subtitle: Whether you need expert guidance or want to share your knowledge — Beep connects you in seconds.
cta.finePrint: No credit card required · Free for clients · Experts pay only when they earn

footer.description: Tunisia’s expert booking platform. 1-on-1 video sessions with verified professionals.

marketplace.title: Marketplace
marketplace.subtitle: Discover and book sessions with verified experts.

expertProfile.description: Experienced professional offering 1-on-1 video consultations. Book a session to get personalized advice and guidance.
expertProfile.escrow: Secure escrow — held until session completes
expertProfile.videoCall: HD video in browser — no downloads
